seo.title: The House | ArdenNest - Quiet luxury holiday home
seo.description: Discover our holiday home with 9 bedrooms and ensuite bathrooms, professional kitchen with Lacanche stove and 2 hectares of garden.

title: The House
h1: 9 bedrooms, ensuite bathrooms and professional kitchen for 26 guests
subtitle: A place where families come together

kitchen.title: Commercial-Grade Kitchen
kitchen.description: Cooking for 26 is not a chore here — it's the highlight of the day. Two professional dishwashers clean everything in one go after dinner. A Lacanche stove where four cooks can work side by side. And enough cold storage for the entire weekend shop. No washing-up arguments, no shortage of pans, no stress.
features_list: 2 Miele Professional dishwashers: 26 plates, 26 glasses, 26 sets of cutlery — all clean in 30 minutes. No chore, no discussion about who does the dishes.
Lacanche Cluny stove: Restaurant-grade stove with gastronorm oven and warming cabinet. Room for multiple cooks to work at the same time.
Full commercial equipment: Professional pots, pans and utensils for 26 guests. Everything you need to cook ambitiously — or simply easily for a large group.
Custom cold storage: Professional fridge and cool pantry with room for the entire group's groceries. No Tetris with packed fridges.

bathrooms.title: Ensuite Bathrooms
bathrooms.description: Every bedroom has its own bathroom — no queues, no shared spaces. Private and comfortable, even with 26 guests.
features_list: 9 ensuite bathrooms — every room has its own bathroom
Silent central ventilation for optimal air quality

bedrooms.title: 9 Bedrooms
bedrooms.description: At ArdenNest, we believe in a worry-free holiday for the whole group. No fuss about who gets the biggest room: our nine bedrooms are spread across two floors and give everyone exactly the same high level of comfort.
features_list: 3 rooms for 2 people: ideal for couples or grandparents.
4 rooms for 3 people: flexible for families with a child.
2 rooms for 4 people: with mezzanine, a favourite with children.
Honest luxury: the same quality finish throughout and spotlessly clean ensuite bathrooms.

oakTable.title: The Oak Table
oakTable.description: This is where stories are told, glasses are filled and dishes are shared. Three solid oak tables, with a view of the garden through the large gate — this is where your holiday comes together.
features_list: 7.2 meters long, 26 seats — no separate kids' table
Extra wide so everyone can see and hear each other
Custom lighting on an original farmhouse beam, our own design

garden.title: The Garden
garden.description: 2 hectares of space to relax, play and enjoy

livingSpace.title: Cozy Living Space
livingSpace.description: Despite the capacity for 26 guests, the house never feels like a hall. Various cozy seating areas ensure you always feel at home.

cta.title: Ready to book?
cta.description: Check availability and book directly with us for the best price.
